'''Cattamascar''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Bakura sector/Legends|Bakura sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==History==
Cattamascar was controlled by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], and was [[Battle of Cattamascar|raided]] by the [[Ssi-ruuvi Imperium]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], shortly before the [[Invasion of Bakura]]. The [[Ssi-ruu]]k won by a narrow margin against the Empire.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Truce at Bakura]]'' {{Mo}}
